BackstoryDef.title: Esports player
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: [PAWN_nameDef] liked to play video games from a young age, playing violent shooter games at a near-expert level. Once [PAWN_pronoun] was old enough, [PAWN_possessive] parents signed them up to play in a local tournament, where they easily crushed the competition. Since then, they have played in many tournaments, winning a hefty amount of cash, and training their hand-eye coordination.
